name: Worship Ministry
description: Leading the church in praise and worship. We exist to create an atmosphere for people to encounter God's presence.

name: Youth Ministry
description: Equipping young people with truth and purpose. We disciple the next generation to become leaders in the church.

name: Evangelism Ministry
description: Taking the Gospel to communities and nations. We organize crusades and outreach programs to win souls for Christ.

name: Men's Ministry
description: Equipping men for leadership in the home, church, and community. Building strong fathers and leaders.

name: Women's Ministry
description: Empowering women to fulfill their God-given potential. Building a sisterhood of faith and service.

name: Children's Ministry
description: Nurturing children in the ways of the Lord. We teach them to love God and His Word from a young age.
